multiplication.prompt: 4 monkeys each hold 3 bananas. How many bananas altogether?
There are 5 treasure chests. Each chest holds 2 gems. How many gems total?
A wizard has 3 bags of magic dust. Each bag has 4 pinches. How many pinches total?
Each pirate ship carries 6 chests of gold. There are 7 ships. How many chests total?
A crystal cave has 8 walls. Each wall has 9 glowing gems. How many gems altogether?
The hero plants 6 rows of magic seeds. Each row has 7 seeds. How many seeds are planted?
A spell book has 12 chapters. Each chapter contains 15 spells. How many spells are in the book?
The island factory makes 24 potions each hour. In 8 hours, how many potions does it produce?

division.prompt: 12 candy pieces are shared equally among 4 friends. How many does each friend get?
There are 10 apples and 5 baskets. If apples are split equally, how many per basket?
A shopkeeper has 35 potions and puts 7 in each box. How many boxes does he fill?
The explorer finds 48 gold coins and splits them equally into 6 bags. How many coins per bag?
The pirate crew caught 56 fish and shared them equally among 8 sailors. How many fish per sailor?
A wizard made 90 spell scrolls and tied them into bundles of 9. How many bundles did he make?
The castle vault holds 144 diamonds arranged in rows of 12. How many rows are there?

addition.prompt: There are 5 red fish and 6 blue fish in the magic pond. How many fish are there?
The hero found 4 coins in a cave and 7 coins on the beach. How many coins total?
The island market has 23 magic wands and receives a shipment of 18 more. How many wands now?
A hero collects 34 coins in the morning and 27 in the afternoon. How many coins total?
Three treasure chests hold 156, 89, and 47 gold coins respectively. How many coins in total?

subtraction.prompt: There are 9 stars in the sky. When morning comes, 4 disappear. How many stars are left?
The monkey had 8 bananas but ate 3. How many bananas are left?
A treasure chest had 50 gold coins. A pirate took 23. How many coins remain?
The magic forest had 64 fireflies. When morning came, 38 flew away. How many stayed?
A wizard started with 200 spell points. After three battles he used 47, 63, and 38 points. How many remain?

mixed.prompt: The hero has 3 bags with 7 crystals each, then finds 5 more crystals in a cave. How many total?
A bakery makes 24 muffins in the morning and 18 in the afternoon, then sells 15. How many are left?
A ship has 6 sailors, each carrying 4 swords. The captain takes 8 swords for the vault. How many swords remain with the crew?
A merchant buys 5 boxes each containing 12 gems, then sells 28 gems at the market. How many gems remain?

fractions.prompt: A pizza is cut into 8 equal slices. The hero eats 3 slices. What fraction of the pizza is left?
A treasure map is split into 4 equal parts. The hero explores 1 part. How many parts remain unexplored?
Half of the 24 gems in a chest are rubies. A quarter of those rubies are giant-sized. How many giant rubies are there?
